title: MLOps lifecycle platform
description: Full MLOps pipeline with model registry, A/B testing, retraining, batch inference, and shadow deployments.

changes.text: Model registry with versioned storage, stage management (dev / staging / production / archived), and format support for ONNX, TorchScript, SafeTensors, TensorRT, and CoreML
A/B testing framework with traffic splitting, statistical comparison (accuracy, latency p95, error rate), and automatic winner detection
Retraining pipelines with configurable triggers (accuracy drift, scheduled cron, manual, data volume) and auto-promotion after validation
Batch inference jobs with S3 / GCS / local storage backends, parallel worker support, and progress tracking with ETA
Benchmark matrix for cross-hardware performance comparison across Jetson, A100, T4, CPU, MPS, and TensorRT targets
Shadow deployments to run candidate models alongside production with agreement rate and divergent sample tracking
Feedback and annotation system for false positives, misclassifications, and bounding box corrections with dataset batching for retraining
Validation test suite with configurable assertions and batch execution across model versions
Model lineage tracking — parent models, dataset versions, code commits, hyperparameters, and training duration
Model export pipeline now supports conversion between ONNX, TensorRT, and CoreML from the dashboard

title: Fleet management
description: Edge fleet control plane with device registration, staged deployments, OTA updates, and real-time monitoring.

changes.text: Fleet control plane backend on port 8001 with device, deployment, heartbeat, command, OTA, alert, maintenance, and group services
Device registration and discovery for cameras, robots, edge nodes, gateways, and drones with hardware spec capture
Device groups with tag-based filtering, auto-scaling policies (CPU threshold, cooldown), and batch operations
Staged model deployments with canary, rolling, blue-green, and all-at-once strategies, plus multi-stage rollout with percentage targets
OTA firmware and model update distribution with checksum verification and bandwidth throttling
Maintenance window scheduling with recurrence rules and device / group targeting
Fleet alerts (device_offline, high_resource_usage, deployment_failed, heartbeat_missed, temperature_high, disk_full) with severity levels and resolution tracking
Device command queue — restart, update_config, deploy_model, rollback, OTA update, and decommission with status tracking
Device agent with heartbeat client, command executor, model cache, bandwidth limiter, resource monitor, and config manager
Fleet dashboard with summary cards, device status table, deployment tracker, and 15-second auto-refresh
CLI fleet commands — `openeye fleet devices`, `openeye fleet deploy`, `openeye fleet groups`, `openeye fleet alerts`, `openeye fleet ota`
Supabase migrations for fleet tables (devices, device_groups, heartbeats, deployments, deployment_device_status, maintenance_windows, fleet_alerts, device_commands) with row-level security
Device registry schema expanded — breaking change for existing device records. Run `openeye fleet migrate` to update.

title: Scene graph & export pipeline
description: Full scene-graph output, batch export, and dashboard metrics view.

changes.text: Scene graph output format with spatial relations between detected objects
Batch export to JSON / CSV / COCO from dashboard
Metrics dashboard with latency and throughput charts (Recharts)
WebSocket protocol upgraded to binary frames for large payloads
RTSP reconnect loop on unstable networks

title: Credits & billing
description: Credit-based billing system with Stripe checkout, balance tracking, and transaction history.

changes.text: Credit-based billing — 1 credit per inference, with balance display and low-balance warnings
Stripe-powered checkout via cred.diy with multiple pricing tiers
Credit transaction history with filtering and pagination
Insufficient credits dialog prompting users to purchase before inference
Supabase Edge Functions for credit management (sync user, deduct, checkout)
Inference endpoint now validates credit balance before processing

title: Safety model improvements
description: Improved safety classification accuracy and added configurable thresholds.

changes.text: Configurable safety thresholds via config editor
Safety model upgraded to v2 with 12% better recall
False positives on partially occluded objects
Memory leak in long-running live stream sessions

title: Multi-LLM integration & adapters
description: Pluggable LLM providers, expanded model adapter system, and depth estimation support.

changes.text: LLM provider system with Gemini and OpenAI (GPT-4V) backends for vision-language queries
Model adapter framework — pluggable interface for YOLOv8, Depth-Anything, and Grounding DINO
Depth estimation pipeline with monocular depth output via Depth-Anything adapter
Open-vocabulary object detection via Grounding DINO adapter
CLI `openeye pull` / `openeye push` for model registry management with download resume
Structured function calling schemas for LLM outputs (Pydantic models)
Perception pipeline refactored to use adapter interface instead of hardcoded YOLO path

title: Live stream mode
description: Real-time inference on RTSP and webcam streams with sub-100ms latency.

changes.text: Live stream mode with RTSP / webcam / HTTP-FLV support
Dashboard live view with real-time bounding box overlay
CLI `openeye watch` command for continuous monitoring
WebSocket perception streaming endpoints (/ws, /ws/perception, /ws/vlm, /ws/agentic)
Config format v2 — see migration guide

title: Documentation site & config editor
description: Interactive documentation with getting started guide, CLI reference, and runtime config editor.

changes.text: Interactive documentation site with getting started, quickstart, and tutorials
CLI command reference with examples for detect, describe, stream, and server commands
Server API documentation with endpoint descriptions and request/response schemas
Runtime config editor in dashboard with JSON editing and hot-reload support
Custom adapter tutorial — step-by-step guide for writing model adapters
Dashboard settings page reorganized into tabbed layout (server, model, config)

title: API key management
description: Dashboard API key creation, revocation, and usage tracking.

changes.text: API key management page in dashboard with key hashing and secure storage
Per-key usage tracking and rate limit display
Auth token refresh race condition

title: Dashboard & inference history
description: Web dashboard with image upload, inference history, and model settings.

changes.text: Web dashboard with Google / Apple OAuth sign-in
Image upload inference with detection overlay and bounding box visualization
Inference history with search, filters, and thumbnail previews
Model settings panel (confidence threshold, NMS, max detections, model variant, class filters)
Server health monitoring with connection status and active model display
REST API response format standardized across all endpoints

title: Object tracking & change detection
description: Frame-to-frame object tracking, change detection, and improved Docker workflow.

changes.text: Object tracking across video frames with ID persistence
Change detection module for identifying scene differences between frames
Query system for searching detected objects by class, confidence, or spatial position
Docker Compose setup for local development with hot-reload
CLI output formatting improved with color-coded results and progress bars
Windows path handling in CLI for backslash-separated paths

title: Initial release
description: Core perception engine, CLI tool, and Python/TypeScript SDKs.

changes.text: Core perception engine with YOLO + CLIP pipeline
CLI tool: `openeye detect`, `openeye describe`
Python SDK and TypeScript SDK
Docker image and Helm chart
Safety module with validation and content filtering
Comprehensive API documentation
